attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT GG_WIPS_POS.POS_TRANS_ID,
GG_WIPS_POS.BATCH_ID,
GG_WIPS_POS.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
--GG_WIPS_POS.STATUS,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.STATUS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) STATUS,
COALESCE(GG_WIPS_POS.CISCO_TERRITORY_ID,-999),
GG_WIPS_POS.QUANTITY,
--GG_WIPS_POS.VENDOR_PART_NUM,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.VENDOR_PART_NUM USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) VENDOR_PART_NUM,
--GG_WIPS_POS.MFG_PART_NUM,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.MFG_PART_NUM USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) MFG_PART_NUM,
GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_EXTENDED_PRICE_LC,
GG_WIPS_POS.CONVERSION_RATE,
GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD,
GG_WIPS_POS.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.VALUATION_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.TRANS_DATE,
GG_WIPS_POS.POSTED_DATE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.D_TO_D_TRANS,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.D_TO_D_TRANS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) D_TO_D_TRANS,
--GG_WIPS_POS.MARKET_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.MARKET_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) MARKET_TYPE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.CONTRACT_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.CONTRACT_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) CONTRACT_TYPE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.CONTRACT_NO,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.CONTRACT_NO USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) CONTRACT_NO,
--GG_WIPS_POS.DROP_SHIP,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.DROP_SHIP USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DROP_SHIP,
--GG_WIPS_POS.SECOND_SOURCE_NAME,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SECOND_SOURCE_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SECOND_SOURCE_NAME,
--GG_WIPS_POS.SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.ACTIVE_FLAG,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.ACTIVE_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ACTIVE_FLAG,
GG_WIPS_POS.CREATED_BY,
GG_WIPS_POS.CREATED_DATE,
GG_WIPS_POS.UPDATED_BY,
GG_WIPS_POS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.TRANS_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.TRANS_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) TRANS_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.RESELLER_PO_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) RESELLER_PO_NUMBER, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SPECIAL_DISCOUNT USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SPECIAL_DISCOUNT,
--GG_WIPS_POS.CLAIM_AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.CLAIM_AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) CLAIM_AUTHORIZATION_NUMBER, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.CLAIM_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.CLAIM_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) CLAIM_TYPE, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.SOURCE_CODE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SOURCE_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOURCE_CODE, 
GG_WIPS_POS.SHIP_DATE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) RESELLER_ACCOUNT_NO, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.SUBSIDIARY_COUNTRY_CODE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SUBSIDIARY_COUNTRY_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SUBSIDIARY_COUNTRY_CODE, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE, 
GG_WIPS_POS.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
GG_WIPS_POS.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_NET_UNIT_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.DEAL_ID,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.DEAL_ID USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DEAL_ID,
--GG_WIPS_POS.POS_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.POS_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) POS_TYPE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.DISTI_SO_NUM,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.DISTI_SO_NUM USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DISTI_SO_NUM,
--GG_WIPS_POS.DISTI_PO_NUM,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.DISTI_PO_NUM USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DISTI_PO_NUM,
--GG_WIPS_POS.ENDUSER_PO_NUM,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.ENDUSER_PO_NUM USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ENDUSER_PO_NUM,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.ENDUSER_CONTACT_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ENDUSER_CONTACT_NAME,
--GG_WIPS_POS.ENDUSER_CONTACT_TEL,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.ENDUSER_CONTACT_TEL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ENDUSER_CONTACT_TEL,
--GG_WIPS_POS.ENDUSER_CONTACT_EMAIL,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.ENDUSER_CONTACT_EMAIL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ENDUSER_CONTACT_EMAIL,
--GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_DEAL_ID USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) REPORTED_DEAL_ID,
--GG_WIPS_POS.CAD_COUNTRY_CODE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.CAD_COUNTRY_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) CAD_COUNTRY_CODE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.CAD_NAME,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.CAD_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) CAD_NAME,
--GG_WIPS_POS.CAD_PO_NUMBER_TO_CDP,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.CAD_PO_NUMBER_TO_CDP USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) CAD_PO_NUMBER_TO_CDP, --- Existing 
GG_WIPS_POS.WIPS_BILLTO_SITE_ID,
GG_WIPS_POS.WIPS_SHIPTO_SITE_ID,
GG_WIPS_POS.WIPS_SOLDTO_SITE_ID,
GG_WIPS_POS.WIPS_ENDUSER_SITE_ID,
GG_WIPS_POS.VALUATION_PRICE_LC,
GG_WIPS_POS.VALIDATED_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
GG_WIPS_POS.COST_UNIT_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.ORIG_COST_UNIT_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.ORIG_BASE_LIST_UNIT_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.ORIG_POS_TRANS_ID,
--GG_WIPS_POS.SECOND_SOURCE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SECOND_SOURCE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SECOND_SOURCE,
--GG_WIPS_POS.OFFICIAL,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.OFFICIAL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) OFFICIAL,
--GG_WIPS_POS.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOLUTION_IDENTIFIER,
GG_WIPS_POS.SOLUTION_DATE,
GG_WIPS_POS.SOLUTION_LENGTH,
--GG_WIPS_POS.MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) MANAGED_SERVICE_TYPE,
GG_WIPS_POS.MANAGED_SERVICE_AMT,
GG_WIPS_POS.TRANSPORT_AMT,
GG_WIPS_POS.INSTALLATION_AMT,
GG_WIPS_POS.MAINTENANCE_AMT,
GG_WIPS_POS.PROFESSIONAL_SERVICE_AMT,
GG_WIPS_POS.OTHER_CONSULTING_AMT,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.WAREHOUSE_NUM USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) WAREHOUSE_NUM,
--GG_WIPS_POS.SALES_CREDIT,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SALES_CREDIT USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SALES_CREDIT,
GG_WIPS_POS.CAD_SOURCE_PROFILE_ID,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.DISTI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DISTI_SALES_ORDER_LINE_NUMBER, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.REBILL_FLAG,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.REBILL_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) REBILL_FLAG,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SCC_QUOTE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SCC_QUOTE_NUMBER,
--GG_WIPS_POS.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) EXPORT_REFERENCE_NUMBER,
--GG_WIPS_POS.ADJUSTED_FLAG,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.ADJUSTED_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ADJUSTED_FLAG, 
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOLDTO_CONTACT_NAME,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOLDTO_CONTACT_TEL, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOLDTO_CONTACT_EMAIL, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SERIAL_NUMBER_STATUS_SUMMARY, 
GG_WIPS_POS.REPORTED_PARTNER_ID,
GG_WIPS_POS.ORIG_BATCH_ID,
--GG_WIPS_POS.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SERVICE_PROVIDER_NAME, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.SERVICE_SO_NUM,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SERVICE_SO_NUM USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SERVICE_SO_NUM, 
GG_WIPS_POS.DUP_POS_TRANS,
GG_WIPS_POS.PDB_PARTNER_ID,
--GG_WIPS_POS.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.PDB_PARTNER_STATUS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PDB_PARTNER_STATUS, 
--GG_WIPS_POS.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.PDB_PARTNER_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PDB_PARTNER_TYPE, 
GG_WIPS_POS.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE_LC,
GG_WIPS_POS.PRE_UP_VAL_NET_UNIT_PRICE,
GG_WIPS_POS.GPOS_REVALUED,
GG_WIPS_POS.DSV_TRANSACTION_ID,
--GG_WIPS_POS.DSV_FLAG ,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.DSV_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) DSV_FLAG, 
GG_WIPS_POS.DSV_UNIQUE_ID,
--GG_WIPS_POS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
TRANSLATE(GG_WIPS_POS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
CAST (GG_WIPS_POS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME AS TIMESTAMP(0)),
CAST (GG_WIPS_POS.REFRESH_DATETIME AS TIMESTAMP(6)),
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) CREATE_DATETIME,
/* Added as part of SFP June 28th Rel */
GG_WIPS_POS.MAGIC_KEY,
GG_WIPS_POS.START_DATE,
GG_WIPS_POS.END_DATE,
GG_WIPS_POS.DURATION,
GG_WIPS_POS.ORG_DISTI_RESELLER_SOL,
GG_WIPS_POS.INTERNAL_POS_FLAG,
GG_WIPS_POS.NET_PRICE_FLAG,
/* Added as part of AI FEB 2025 Rel */
COALESCE(GG_WIPS_POS.Strategic_Intent,'UNKNOWN'),
COALESCE(GG_WIPS_POS.Strategic_Class,'UNKNOWN'),
GG_WIPS_POS.SERVICE_PERIOD,
CASE 
    WHEN GG_WIPS_POS.Strategic_Intent = 'AI_Capable_Intent_Yes' AND  GG_WIPS_POS.STRATEGIC_FACTOR > 0 AND GG_WIPS_POS.STRATEGIC_FACTOR<=1 
	THEN GG_WIPS_POS.STRATEGIC_FACTOR
    ELSE 1 
END AS AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT /* Added as part of MVP4 MAY Rel */
FROM 
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.GG_WIPS_POS_TRANS_EDW_INTF GG_WIPS_POS
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= CAST('$$LastExtractDate' AS TIMESTAMP(0))
 
AND GG_WIPS_POS.BOOKINGS_PUBLISHED='Y' 
AND GG_WIPS_POS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'  
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ID ,POS_TRANS_ID ,BATCH_ID ORDER BY REFRESH_DATETIME DESC)=1
